title: faBolus phone↔remote command contract
description: The tiny message contract shared by the iOS host and its remotes (Apple Watch over WatchConnectivity, Garmin over the Connect IQ mobile SDK). Both the Swift side and the Monkey C side validate/generate against this. Keep it minimal — this is safety-critical surface. DRAFT: finalize during Milestone 2.

version.description: Schema version. Bump on any breaking change; both sides must match.

requestId.description: Client-generated unique id correlating a request → confirm → status across the phone↔watch hop.

units.description: Insulin units to deliver (bolusRequest). Milestone 2 is units-only.

carbsGrams.description: Optional carbs for the calculator flow (Milestone 2 follow-on). Absent = units-only.

bgMgdl.description: Optional BG for the calculator flow (Milestone 2 follow-on).

confirmToken.description: Opaque token issued by the host for a specific bolusRequest; echoed by the remote in bolusConfirm to complete the double-confirmation. Single-use, short-lived.

status.description: Delivery/connection status echoed back to the remote (bolusStatus).

deliveredUnits.description: Units actually delivered so far (bolusStatus) — important for partial-delivery after a cancel.

message.description: Optional human-readable detail for display on the remote.

trend.description: Glucose trend direction token. Remotes draw their own arrow shape from this; their fonts can't render Unicode arrows.

carbRatio.description: Pump's carb ratio (grams per unit), shared so a remote can compute carbs→units locally (statusRead reply).

isf.description: Pump's insulin sensitivity factor (mg/dL per unit) for local correction calc (statusRead reply).

targetBg.description: Pump's correction target (mg/dL) for local correction calc (statusRead reply).

maxBolusUnits.description: Pump's configured max bolus (units) — governs the remote's UI cap (statusRead reply).

reservoirUnits.description: Insulin units remaining in the reservoir (statusRead reply, for a remote's detail screen).

batteryPercent.description: Pump battery percent (statusRead reply, for a remote's detail screen).

lastBolusUnits.description: Units of the most recent bolus (statusRead reply, for a remote's detail screen).

glucoseAgeSec.description: Seconds since the current CGM reading was taken (so a remote can show age and hide readings older than 6 minutes).

history.description: Recent glucose values (mg/dL), oldest→newest, ~5-min spacing, for a remote history plot.

alerts.description: Active pump alerts/alarms (statusRead reply) for a remote to view.

alertId.description: The notification id to clear (dismissAlert command).

alertKind.description: The notification kind to clear (dismissAlert command).

bolusMode.description: Default bolus entry mode a remote should honor (statusRead reply).

bolusIncrement.description: Units step for a remote's bolus entry (statusRead reply).

carbIncrement.description: Grams step for a remote's carb entry (statusRead reply).

defaultScreen.description: Garmin remote screen shown first (statusRead reply).

glucoseStaleMinutes.description: Minutes after which a CGM reading is stale (statusRead reply): remotes de-emphasize it and stop using it for carb→unit correction, matching the phone.

glucoseHideDelayMinutes.description: Minutes after going stale to keep showing the greyed value before hiding it as '--' (statusRead reply). 0 = hide immediately when stale; omitted = never hide.
